touchpoints.notes: Kiosk URL opens with store query _ds=2790.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Create session_id immediately before first network call.

touchpoints.notes: Welcome page and store name visible.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track page load with store_id and device context.

touchpoints.notes: Console logged No device found and footer displayed Device ID not found.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Emit explicit device_context_missing with context_missing=device_session_id,kiosk_id when absent.

touchpoints.notes: App config, seller config, feature flags, legal docs, store details, and stock location APIs loaded.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track each bootstrap API with endpoint template, status, and duration.

touchpoints.notes: Current anonymous session check returned 401.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Classify 401 before login as anonymous_state, not customer journey failure.

touchpoints.notes: CTA visible and clicked. Device info overlay can intercept the button center.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track click and fix overlay hit area mismatch.

touchpoints.notes: Mobile number screen visible after tapping CTA.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track screen view with session_id and store_id.

touchpoints.notes: Endpoint returned 400 and Sentry envelope was sent.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Send this to ops as journey configuration error.

touchpoints.notes: Numeric keypad, Clear, and Backspace are visible. No mobile entered in this capture.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track only input state changes and validation result. Never store raw mobile.

touchpoints.notes: OTP API was observed in earlier authenticated capture; current session stopped before entering mobile.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track click, masked mobile_hash, api_status, and failure_reason.

touchpoints.notes: Requires real mobile/OTP journey. Do not capture OTP.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Capture status and latency only.

touchpoints.notes: Verify OTP endpoint observed previously. Current session did not submit OTP.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track user_id_hash on success; failure_reason on failure.

touchpoints.notes: Screen was observed in earlier session; current capture did not authenticate.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track after OTP success with scanner/device context.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle contains Let's Start Scanning CTA.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track click plus scanner_available boolean.

touchpoints.notes: Physical scanner event could not be triggered in browser.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Emit event from scanner integration with barcode_hash and scan_source=device.

touchpoints.notes: Success should be separated from cart add. Failure reasons unknown.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track scanner_read_success, item_resolved_success, and cart_add_success separately.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle and earlier capture show Having trouble scanning? Enter product barcode.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track modal open and reason manual_entry.

touchpoints.notes: Earlier test used barcode 8905888014083. Modal copy says 12 digit while EAN is 13 digit.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track validation result and fix copy/validation mismatch.

touchpoints.notes: Observed product reached cart, but separate product-resolution API was not isolated.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Add explicit item_resolved_success/failure before cart add.

touchpoints.notes: addItems returned 200 in earlier captured flow.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track quantity, product_id, brand_id, barcode_hash, cart_id_hash, and value.

touchpoints.notes: updateCartUser returned 200 in earlier captured flow.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track masked user/cart references for joins.

touchpoints.notes: Cart had Items (1), offers, coupon, GST, price summary, proceed CTA.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Capture cart totals and item count from real cart response.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle includes quantity logic; specific button was not exercised.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track item_id, old_quantity, new_quantity, status, and cart_id_hash.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle contains Remove paths; not exercised to avoid altering prior cart state.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track remove click and API result separately.

touchpoints.notes: Voucher endpoint returned 200 earlier.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track only offer availability and masked user/cart references.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle exposes coupon endpoints; no coupon was applied in capture.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track coupon_code_hash, discount amount, and rejection reason.

touchpoints.notes: GST invoice option visible in cart.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track toggle state only; do not store raw GSTIN in analytics.

touchpoints.notes: Proceed To Checkout CTA was observed and clicked in earlier flow.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track cart total, item count, cart_id_hash, and checkout_mode=self.

touchpoints.notes: Address lookup returned 200 in earlier flow.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Mask mobile/user query values and track status/latency only.

touchpoints.notes: Payment screen heading Choose How You'd Like to Pay was observed earlier and is present in bundle.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track visible methods as array, not raw gateway secrets.

touchpoints.notes: Payment options returned 200 in earlier flow.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track amount, cart_id_hash, payment methods count, status, and latency.

touchpoints.notes: Aggregator key endpoint returned 200 earlier.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track status only. Never log key payload.

touchpoints.notes: Stopped before clicking Jio Partner Pay/payment method.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track selected payment_mode and cart_id_hash before payment_init.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle includes Razorpay, Simpl, Stripe, EDC, payment-orders and payment-link surfaces; not triggered.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track gateway, payment_session_id_hash, amount, and status at initiation.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle exposes Cancel Transaction and Back To Cart copy.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track cancel/back/close separately with current payment state.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle exposes Retry Payment copy.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track retry count per session/cart/payment_session.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle contains success, failure, and connection-timeout assets and polling endpoints; not triggered.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Capture gateway response code, failure_reason, timeout duration, and transaction_id_hash.

touchpoints.notes: Platform docs/bundle expose order endpoints. Not triggered because payment was not initiated.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Join order_id_hash to sales order_id and cart_id_hash after successful payment.

touchpoints.notes: Bundle contains order-status and order-details routes.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Track order completion screen view with masked order/cart refs.

touchpoints.notes: Completion route found in bundle; not reached in safe capture.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Emit after order_created and success screen render.

touchpoints.notes: No explicit session_end observed. End conditions include completion, timeout, cancel, browser close, inactivity.
touchpoints.recommended_action: Emit on journey_complete, clear cart, end shopping, timeout, and unload fallback.
